sentences.arabic: الْبَرْمَجَةُ هِيَ اللُّغَةُ الَّتِي تَفْهَمُهَا الْحَوَاسِيبُ.
sentences.translation: Programiranje je jezik koji računari razumiju.
sentences.translationEn: Programming is the language that computers understand.

sentences.arabic: تَعَلَّمَ أَخِي كِتَابَةَ أَكْوَادٍ بَسِيطَةٍ فِي الْعَامِ الْمَاضِي.
sentences.translation: Moj brat je naučio pisati jednostavne kodove prošle godine.
sentences.translationEn: My brother learned to write simple codes last year.

sentences.arabic: يُرِيدُ أَنْ يَبْنِيَ تَطْبِيقًا جَدِيدًا لِلْهَوَاتِفِ الذَّكِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Želi napraviti novu aplikaciju za pametne telefone.
sentences.translationEn: He wants to build a new application for smartphones.

sentences.arabic: تَعَلُّمُ الْبَرْمَجَةِ يَفْتَحُ فُرَصًا كَثِيرَةً لِلْعَمَلِ.
sentences.translation: Učenje programiranja otvara mnoge prilike za posao.
sentences.translationEn: Learning programming opens many opportunities for work.
